remarks: Great location in the Food Market of Stamford - Turnkey opportunity to own a successful Pokemoto franchise, a fast-growing fast-casual restaurant brand specializing in fresh, customizable Hawaiian-inspired poke bowls, salads, wraps, and beverages. This established Stamford location has been continuously operating for 7 years with a proven revenue history and loyal customer base. The restaurant caters to the growing health-conscious dining segment, offering made-to-order menu items that appeal to customers seeking nutritious, customizable meal options. Pokemoto has built strong brand recognition in the competitive fast-casual market, positioning itself well within the expanding healthy dining trend. Business Features: * Fully operational turnkey restaurant with modern decor * Established operational systems and procedures * Trained staff currently in place * Minimal supervision required for day-to-day operations * Easy-to-manage business model * Strong customer loyalty and repeat business * Growing brand with franchise support system * Prime location in Rich Stamford market This opportunity is ideal for an owner-operator or investor seeking to enter the thriving restaurant industry with an established, profitable concept. The business benefits from the growing popularity of Hawaiian cuisine and the increasing consumer demand for healthy, fast-casual dining options. Great Potential of Growth.7 years lease left. Great Landlord.
